name: Dev Mode Extension Framework
description: Versioned Dev Mode extension scaffold, contributor governance root, and distro template surface for the `dev` profile.
goal: Provide a Wizard-gated contributor extension lane that keeps `/dev/` framework content separate from local mutable working data.
definition_of_done: Dev Mode install, activation, contributor tracking files, GitHub sync policy, and local-only working areas remain aligned to the v1.5 contract.

routing_rules: Dev Mode is available only through the active dev extension lane
GitHub sync remains permission-gated and Wizard-managed

guidelines:
1. Keep contributor planning inside /dev
2. Keep runtime logic in wizard or core
3. Treat /dev as the versioned template root
4. Keep local mutable working data separate
5. Route Dev Mode lifecycle through Wizard
process: 1. Install extension -> 2. Enable dev profile -> 3. Activate in Wizard -> 4. Use contributor TUI -> 5. Sync contributor work under policy
